basis: Ratepayer surplus avoided: discounted gap between the flat cost-based PUD wholesale rate and an escalating for-profit counterfactual, over the served base. WHOLESALE $480/yr anchor, NOT retail ~$120/mo Starlink. FISHER nominal discount (~4% at base inflation). Household surplus avoided, NOT District margin -- do NOT sum with the cost-recovery NPV. Escalation floored at 0 (models the dollar bill). Headline applies the near-certain NCI exit; no-exit and full-22%-loss runs are the bracket ends. Bands not points.
